analyst.role: deep strategic analysis of flagged changes

decider.role: triage actions, morning briefing, suggested patches

integrity.role: site health: links, tabs, build drift, data-prose consistency

tinker.role: pipeline self-repair: audit outputs, trace handoffs, fix stale configs

social.role: track dome author activity, claim overlap, mentions of review

change_classifications.noise: Auto-pipeline data refresh, timestamp updates, cosmetic changes
change_classifications.minor: Wording tweaks, formatting, typo fixes — no substantive claim change
change_classifications.substantive: New WINs, altered claims, changed parameters, new equations
change_classifications.strategic: Responses to our review, structural model changes, new defense arguments
change_classifications.critical: Fundamental parameter changes, new kill-shot defenses, accuracy methodology changes
